narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 2-B (precinct in Huron County) has 640 registered voters, with 64.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
